creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
gahr        2008-07-08 18:37:45 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    lang                 Makefile 
  Added files:
    lang/plt-scheme      Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    lang/plt-scheme/files patch-src-mzscheme-src_number.c 
    lang/plt-scheme/scripts configure 
  Log:
  - New port: plt-scheme
  
   The PLT-Scheme group have released a new version of
   their Scheme language and IDE tools suite, and here's a
   port that builds it on FreeBSD.
  
  PR:             124776
  Submitted by:   Andrew Reilly <areilly@bigpond.net.au> (new maintainer)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.592     +1 -0      ports/lang/Makefile
  1.1       +77 -0     ports/lang/plt-scheme/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/lang/plt-scheme/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +26 -0     ports/lang/plt-scheme/files/patch-src-mzscheme-src_number.c (new)
  1.1       +22 -0     ports/lang/plt-scheme/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +11809 -0  ports/lang/plt-scheme/pkg-plist (new)
  1.1       +18 -0     ports/lang/plt-scheme/scripts/configure (new)
